object1.description: When cluster administrators need to manage GPU resources efficiently, I want to monitor usage patterns and reclaim idle resources, so I can optimize cost and availability.

result_ids.description: Data scientists can successfully launch and manage GPU-enabled workspaces for GenAI model training

evidence.teaser: I use kubectl and custom scripts to check resource allocation but it's hard to see which workspaces ...
evidence.quote: I use kubectl and custom scripts to check resource allocation but it's hard to see which workspaces are actually using their GPUs versus just requesting them.

evidence.teaser: The biggest issue is idle GPU workspaces consuming expensive resources. Users request 8 GPUs but onl...
evidence.quote: The biggest issue is idle GPU workspaces consuming expensive resources. Users request 8 GPUs but only use 2 or leave workspaces running overnight.

evidence.teaser: Extremely important! I need reliable GPU allocation for fine-tuning large language models. Waiting f...
evidence.quote: Extremely important! I need reliable GPU allocation for fine-tuning large language models. Waiting for resources blocks my entire workflow.

evidence.quote: Extremely important! I need reliable GPU allocation for fine-tuning large language models. Waiting for resources blocks my entire workflow.

evidence.teaser: Faster workspace launch times and better visibility into resource availability. I want to know if GP...
evidence.quote: Faster workspace launch times and better visibility into resource availability. I want to know if GPUs are available before starting a big training job.

evidence.teaser: I need to pause idle workspaces in bulk and reallocate their GPUs to active users. Manual inspection...
evidence.quote: I need to pause idle workspaces in bulk and reallocate their GPUs to active users. Manual inspection of each workspace takes too much time.
